intro:

Echium is a genus of flowering plants in the family Boraginaceae, commonly known as the "viper's bugloss". The plant Echium has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, with reported health benefits including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as potential applications in wound healing and antimicrobial therapies.
